query:
SELECT id, symbol, recommendation, score, created_at,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) as minutos_atras
FROM sofia_analyses 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 48pPh9xYP94hzUq.root --database 7RQABHEP2Bfkm28njawraw --execute SELECT id, symbol, recommendation, score, created_at,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) as minutos_atras
FROM sofia_analyses 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
